buildReminders.text: Save Regals/Alcs/Runes/Exalts for Lv 16 Varnished Crossbow.
Next crossbow target: Lv 33 Bombard Crossbow.
Final-campaign crossbow: Lv 59 Cannonade Crossbow.
Tense Crossbow > Makeshift starter — upgrade ASAP.
Lv 10+ vendor check: Sturdy Crossbow base.
Mod priorities: HIGH FLAT DAMAGE > %IPD. Suffix: +# to projectile skill levels.
Lv 16 craft: magic base w/ flat → Essence (Abrasion/Flames/Ice/Electricity) or Regal → exalt to 3 prefixes → socket Storm Rune → whetstone.
Damage rune priority: Storm > Desert > Glacial > Iron.
Act 3+: use REGULAR essences (Lesser too weak for Lv 33+ weapons).
Main: Explosive Grenade + Fragmentation Rounds.
Drop Fragmentation Rounds — Explosive Grenade only.
Flash Grenade for trash clear + boss stuns.
Reach Lv 14 before Geonor — Gas Grenade unlocks then.
First Lv 5 Uncut Skill Gem → cut as Gas Grenade.
Combo: Gas Grenade → Explosive Grenade (detonate).
Bosses: Gas → Explosive on cooldown. Gas cap = 6.
Pre-Bombard: cast Gas twice per Explosive.
Once you have Oil Grenade, throw one before usual rotation.
Supports — Explosive Grenade: Multishot I + Elemental Armament I.
Supports — Flash Grenade: Multishot I.
At Lv 14: move Multishot I from Flash → Gas Grenade.
Add Elemental Armament I to Gas Grenade.
Upgrade priority (Lv 14-51): Explosive > Gas > Flash.
Tier 2: Multishot II → Explosive → Gas → Flash.
Tier 2: Elemental Armament II → Explosive → Gas.
Swap clear to Cluster Grenade — one-shots packs.
Frost Bomb stops applying exposure above its level cap (Lv 1 gem = mobs Lv 20-). Drop when no longer working.
Lv 3 gem order: Rust King → upgrade Explosive; Lachlann → Flash; Crowbell → Pounce.

Clearfell.text: Cut Clearfell skill gem as Frost Bomb.

The Grelwood.text: Aregane's Hut: cut Multishot I → put on Explosive Grenade.

The Red Vale.text: Rust King's Lv 3 gem: upgrade Explosive Grenade.
Click every Rusted/Refined Arm — guaranteed class weapon base (one per Arm; full set covers every weapon type).

Cemetery of the Eternals.text: Lachlann's Lv 3 gem: cut as Flash Grenade.
Side-zone trick: enter Mausoleum FIRST → Tomb becomes Lv 9 → kill Asinia → ctrl+click new Mausoleum (now Lv 9) → kill Draven for Lv 11 item drops.

Hunting Grounds.text: Optional Ritual Lv 4 gem: candidate for Pounce.

Ogham Village.text: Save Leitis quest reward (Lv 5 gem): cut as Gas Grenade.
Grab Blank Rune + Artificer's Orb next to Smithing Tools.
Trade Blank Rune → Renly → Lesser Storm Rune (for Lv 16 weapon craft).

Vastiri Outskirts.text: Act 2 starts — currency now OK to use. Hunt Lv 16 Varnished Crossbow.

Buried Shrines.text: Lesser Jeweller's Orb → Explosive Grenade. Add Magnified Area I (later swap to Deliberation).

Sandswept Marsh.text: Lesser Jeweller's Orb → Gas Grenade. Add Magnified Area I.

Deshar.text: Guaranteed Artificer's Orb along outer wall near entrance.

Isle of Kin.text: Guaranteed Greater Rune from The Blind Beast (Primal Arena).

Singing Caverns.text: Hunt Pearlescent Amulet: +# to level of all projectile skills > Life/Res.
